Q-GATE-1.description: Entropy challenger precision must match or exceed Deequ baseline

Q-GATE-2.description: Entropy challenger must detect >= 90% of injected violations

Q-GATE-3.description: Balanced quality score must match or exceed baseline

Q-WARN-1.description: Entropy latency should not exceed 2x baseline

Q-WARN-2.description: Entropy must detect >= 85% of distribution anomalies that rules miss

D-GATE-1.description: Entropy FPR must not exceed KS-test baseline

D-GATE-2.description: Entropy must detect >= 85% of injected drift

D-WARN-1.description: Gradual drift sensitivity target for the current entropy calibration

D-WARN-2.description: Entropy produces a single interpretable health score (KS-test does not)

decision_rule.pass: Per-run verdict: all hard gates pass and no warning gates breach.
decision_rule.warn: Per-run verdict: all hard gates pass but one or more warning gates breach.
decision_rule.fail: Per-run verdict: at least one hard gate breaches.
decision_rule.incomplete: Per-run verdict: one or more required metrics are unavailable, so one or more gates cannot be fully evaluated.
